values.action.wipe-frost-from-window.title: Wipe the Frost
values.action.wipe-frost-from-window.descriptio: Clear a patch of the pod window with your hand.
values.action.wipe-frost-from-window.success: The frost smears beneath your palm. Beyond the glass, loose cables hang over a dark compartment, and a strip of stars shows through a breach in the far wall.
values.action.wipe-frost-from-window.failure: The frost softens but will not clear. Only a few fixed points of light show through it.
values.action.inspect-status-lamp.title: Inspect the Status Lamp
values.action.inspect-status-lamp.description: Study the damaged indicator beside the window.
values.action.inspect-status-lamp.success: Three symbols cycle beneath cracked plastic: temperature failure, memory interface offline, lid actuator fault. The last symbol remains lit longer than the others.
values.action.inspect-status-lamp.failure: The lamp gutters while you watch. Its fractured symbols do not hold long enough to read.
values.action.listen-to-pod-machinery.title: Listen to the Machinery
values.action.listen-to-pod-machinery.descripti: Hold still and separate the pod's sounds from the vessel around it.
values.action.listen-to-pod-machinery.success: A pump knocks twice, pauses, then fails to catch on the third stroke. Behind it, metal ticks slowly as the hull loses heat.
values.action.listen-to-pod-machinery.failure: Your breathing fills the shell. The machinery beneath it remains uneven and indistinct.
values.action.feel-along-lid-seam.title: Search the Lid Seam
values.action.feel-along-lid-seam.description: Trace the edge of the lid for a latch or manual release.
values.action.feel-along-lid-seam.success: Your fingers find a recessed lever below your left shoulder. Its cover is missing, and frozen lubricant binds the exposed hinge.
values.action.feel-along-lid-seam.failure: The seam is numbingly cold. Your fingers slip before they find purchase.

privateNotes: The opening choices establish the exposed room, pod failure, and a discoverable manual escape route without front-loading an explanation.
